channel.title: AI Prompts on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in AI Prompts on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Write Better Etsy Product Descriptions with AI Prompts
item.description: If you’re an Etsy seller, you know the grind of writing product descriptions. You’ve got a shop full of unique, handmade items, but turning their charm into words that actually sell? That’s a whole different beast. Most sellers slap together a few generic lines, hoping buyers will “get it.” Spoiler: they don’t. Weak descriptions mean fewer clicks, fewer sales, and a shop that’s stuck in the Etsy algorithm’s basement. The good news?

item.title: How to Create Better Client Resources with AI for Coaches and Therapists
item.description: How to Create Better Client Resources with AI for Coaches and Therapists If you’re a coach or therapist, you know the grind of creating client resources. Worksheets, guided exercises, reflection prompts—these tools are essential for helping clients grow, but they take hours to brainstorm and write. You’re already stretched thin with sessions, admin, and marketing. How do you keep delivering high-quality materials without burning out? AI can be your shortcut. It’s not about replacing your expertise; it’s about amplifying it.
